name: Chocolate-Covered Brandied Cherries
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour brandy over the drained cherries and let set for two days.
2. In a bowl, combine butter and salt. Blend until smooth.
3. Add sifted powdered sugar and mix well. Knead until smooth and shiny; chill for 30 minutes wrapped in waxed paper.
4. While chilling, drain cherries well on paper towels and pat dry (reserve brandy marinade for brushing on cakes or for cooking).
5. Shape a marble-sized piece of fondant around each cherry and place on a wax paper-lined tray. Chill until firm, about 2 hours.
6. Melt chocolates separately over hot water, stirring constantly. Dip cherries and place on wax paper-lined tray. Place in refrigerator to set.
7. Store in a covered container in a cool, dark place for 10-14 days to fully ripen.
